imageAlt: App force update roadmap item preview image
title: App force update
summaryBody: Force updating users to the latest app version on 13th Nov to ensure no one is using the old Sensibil camera prior to our contract ending, and that our native login fallback is fully removed (therefore unblocking web’s login email check release).
detailBody: Force updating users to the latest app version on 13th Nov to ensure no one is using the old Sensibil camera prior to our contract ending, and that our native login fallback is fully removed (therefore unblocking web’s login email check release).
